metaData.Ingredients: Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Perfume, Behentrimonium Chloride, Dimenthicone, Dipropylene Glycol, Stearamidopropyl Dimenthylamine, Amodimenticone, Sodium Chloride, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, PEG-7 Propylheptyl Ether, Phenoxyethanol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Magnesum Nitrate, Cyclotetrasiloxane, Methylisothiazolinone, Glycerin, Argaina Spinosa Kernel Oil, Acetic Acid, Sodium Sulfate, Camellia Japonica Flower Extract, CI 17200
metaData.Key Information: Co-created with Yuko Yamashita, smooth and straight expert from Tokyo, so you have your hair always on your side. This exclusive formula with flexishield technology and 5 natural oils, infuse hair with bounce and flexibility in movement, so you have smooth and manageable hair that always goes with your flow.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions For Use:
1. After shampoo-ing, apply evenly to wet hair (Avoiding the roots), especially on ends
2. Rinse thoroughly
• Caution:
In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Perfume, Behentrimonium Chloride, Dimethicone, Dipropylene Glycol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Amodimethicone, Sodium Chloride, Glycerin, Lactic Acid, Disodium Edta, Cyclotetrasiloxane, Peg-7 Propylheptyl Ether, Phenoxyethanol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Magnesium Nitrate, Camellia Oleifera Seed Oil, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Lysine Hcl, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Magnesium Chloride, Methylisothiazolinone, Sodium Sulfate, Acetic Acid, CI 15985, CI 19140
metaData.Key Information: Co-created with Thomas Taw, dry and damage expert from London, so you have your hair always on your side. This exclusive formula with moisture-lock technology and 5 natural oils. It seamlessly locks in the moistured feel of your hair, so it looks healthy, resilient and soft to touch.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Pour into your hair, apply evenly over your wet hair and massage gently
2. Rinse off thoroughly
• Caution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. If contact, rinse eyes thoroughly with water
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Dimethicone, Perfume, Dipropylene Glycol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Amodimethicone, Sodium Chloride, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, Cyclotetrasiloxane, Phenoxyethanol, PEG-7 Propylheptyl Ether, Cetrimonium Chloride, Magnesium Nitrate, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sclerocarya Birrea Seed Oil, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Lysine HCl, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Magnesium Chloride, Methylisothiazolinone, Potassium Sorbate, Acetic Acid, Hydrolyzed Keratin (Sheep Wool Source)
metaData.Key Information:
• Professional quality formulation: Specially formulated with keratin and argan oil
• Keratin: Penetrates the hair fiber and acts as a protective and care substance
• Argan Oil: Rich in vitamin E and fatty acids to tame frizz, promote softness and shine as well as improve manageability of hair effectively
• Contains other natural oils like marula oil, shea butter oil and jojoba oil
• 5 Smoothing benefits in 1 wash: Anti-frizz, detangles, shine, smooth, tames fly-always
• Hair will be silky smooth, with natural movement
• Suitable for frizzy hair
metaData.Preparation:
1. Brush before wash - Gently brush to detangle hair before washing
2. Rinse pre-shampoo - Rinse thoroughly with warm water and do a light scalp massage to remove dirt and grease before shampoo, this allows quicker lathering of shampoo as well
3. Shampoo - Apply to wet hair, gentle massage to work into a lather and rinse thoroughly
4. Lightly squeeze the shampoo from roots to ends and rinse thoroughly
5. Conditioner - Squeeze conditioner into your palm and rub hands together to help distribute evenly
6. Apply conditioner to wet hair from mid-lengths to ends, leave for 2-3 minutes and rinse
7. Follow with hair mask and rinse completely
8. Rinse & Dry - Rinse completely, be extremely gentle when towel-drying to reduce damage caused by friction
9. Style/Protect - Finish by styling with your favourite TRESemme products
10. For protection from heat styling tools, use keratin smooth heat protect hair spray before you styleCaution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water

metaData.Ingredients: Water / Aqua / Eau, Dipropylene Glycol, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Behentrimonium Chloride, Caffeine, Fragrance / Parfum, Amodimethicone, Climbazole, Disodium Edta, Ethylhexylglycerin, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Benzyl Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Steartrimonium Chloride, Hydrolyzed Extensin, Dextrin, Lactic Acid, Arginine, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Rosa Damascena Flower Extract, Propanediol, Punica Granatum Fruit Extract, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Oleic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer, Hyaluronic Acid, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Hydroxypropyl Bispalmitamide Mea, Cholesterol, Camellia Japonica Seed Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Camellia Sinensis Seed Oil, Stearic Acid, Linoleic Acid, Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice) Root Extract, Xylitylglucoside, Punica Granatum Flower Extract, Anhydroxylitol, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Xylitol
metaData.Key Information:
• Split-end relief
• Hair elasticity improvement
• Nourishing and moisturising
• Clinically proven improved damage care efficacy
- helps repair damaged hair from 1st use
- reduces hair tangles by 38% (for hair damaged by coloring and perming)
• Key ingredients:
- premium anti-aging ginseng from hair loss lab's 40-year legacy.
- MFDS-certified hair loss relief with the power of caffeine.
- Innovative rice-derived hydrolyzed extension for optimal hair health.
• Floral powdery fragrance
metaData.Preparation:
How to use :
1. After shampooing, lightly remove water from your hair and apply the product thoroughly to your hair without touching the scalp.
2. After 2-3 minutes wash off with lukewarm water.


Warnings:
1. Wash off immediately when it gets into your eyes
2. Not washing off after usage can cause hairloss or bleaching
3. If abnormal symptoms or side effects such as red spots, swelling, or itching is noticed when using product or after use from direct sunlight, consult with physician
4. Limit use on broken or wounded skin
metaData.Storage Information:
1. Keep out of reach of children
2. Keep away from direct sunlight
3. When product is spilled on the floor, be cautious of slipperiness and immediately wipe it off with water.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Dimethicone, Cocamide MEA, Zinc Carbonate, Glycol Distearate, Sodium Chloride, Zinc Pyrithione, Sodium Xylenesulfonate, Fragrance, Cetyl Alcohol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Sodium Benzoate, Magnesium Carbonate Hydroxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Methychloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone
metaData.Key Information:
• Cleanses hair and scalp for revitalized beautiful hair
• Makes hair feels soft and fresh, light and easy to manage
• Powered with HydraZinc technology to keep hair completely dandruff free
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Shake before use
2. Wet hair and gently massage onto scalp
3. Lather and rinse thoroughly
4. Repeat if desired
• Caution:
Avoid contact with eyes and if this happens, rinse thoroughly with water

product.description:
• Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water.
• If any irritation occurs, stop use and consult a doctor
• Not to be used for children under three years old.
• Do not let water enter the container when using. After use, please close the cap.

metaData.Key Information:
• Bond Restore Technology
Formulated with a blend of Seaweed extracts to protect and smoothen hair cuticles, reducing hair friction by 33% to minimise breakage.^
• Scalp Care Complex
Formulated with Japanese Citrus Unshiu Peel extract known to help hair loss problems and scalp care complex provides hydration to hair. 92% of consumers reported no scalp itchiness during use.^^
• Camellia Oil Force
Powered by Tsubaki’s signature ingredient to deeply moisturise, repair damage, reduce frizz and breakage, and hydrate the scalp for healthier hair and scalp.
•Damage-Sensor Technology
Detects and attaches to damaged areas of the hair to deliver repairing effect.

*Due to hair breakage. Based on Instrumental Evaluation on hair tress, Feb 2024.
**Based on consumer test , 63 respondents (HairFall SP), 62 respondents (HairFall TM), China, Feb-Mar 2024.

^Based on third-party instrumental test, China, Mar 2024.
^^Based on consumer tests, 63 respondents, China, Feb-Mar. 2024.
metaData.Preparation:
• Hold cap and turn nozzle in to unlock the pump, push pump a few times until conditioner is dispensed.
• After shampooing, apply an adequate amount to hair and rinse thoroughly with water.
• No waiting time needed.
metaData.SAP Product Name: TSUBAKI PREMIUM EX HAIR FALL CARE & REPAIR CONDITIONER 450ML
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place
